notes: v0.5.2 — Auto-update endpoint migrated off public GitHub. UPDATE_MANIFEST_URL and rb_url now both point at https://hohomehk-plugin.ngrok.app (no auth, served from local box via ngrok). The shipped .rb continues to bundle the cf-aig-authorization token (BYOK requires it on the gateway side per CF docs), but because the .rb lives only behind a private tunnel, GitHub / CF leaked-token scanners never see it. We burned 3 tokens to public GitHub releases learning this; this design ends the revoke cycle. WP server keeps using AI Gateway directly (token there lives only in wp_options on the private deco2hk-srv host).
